memory.what_this_project_is: A circular-economy candle business recycling used candle wax and jars into new candles, with retail partners collecting empties and selling recycled products.
core_idea: Reuse leftover wax from candles and tea lights
Buy only essential inputs: wicks, fragrance, some clean wax
Customers and shops return jars for reuse
traction_achieved: Social media request for empty jars produced strong responses
Shops ordered packs of recycled tea lights
why_it_paused: Demand became hard to manage from a one-bedroom flat
Storage, labelling, product safety too much for one person
Had not yet reached smooth profitability
memory.filing_status: LEGACY — Business case study | Possible future circular-economy project | Candidate for AI-assisted automation if revived
memory.next_action: Archive as legacy business case study with operational lessons and revival potential noted
